title: dufrenoya collettii
intro: Dufrenoya collettii is a plant species belonging to the family Rutaceae, native to the tropical regions of Mexico and Central America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. Dufrenoya collettii has been found to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory problems. It can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves can also be used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
